title: Slab Engine — New Regime Tax Computation
description: Computes income tax under the New Regime (Section 115BAC) using the six-bracket slab schedule introduced by Finance Act 2023 and applicable from AY2024-25 onwards. No age bracket differentiation — the same slabs apply to all age groups. Special-rate income (capital gains, lottery, VDA) is computed at flat rates from TaxTable:2024.special_rates, same as in R-0016. All rate values come from TaxTable:2024.tax_slabs.new_regime.

logic.then: 1. Load slab schedule from TaxTable:2024.tax_slabs.new_regime.slabs (single schedule, no age differentiation). 2. Compute slab tax: for each slab band: tax_on_band = (min(taxable_income_new_regime, band.to ?? Infinity) - band.from) * band.rate for each band where taxable_income > band.from; slab_tax_new = sum of tax_on_band values. 3. Compute special rate taxes identically to R-0016 step 4 — rates from TaxTable:2024.special_rates.rates. 4. Output: { slab_tax_new_regime, special_rate_tax_new_regime: [{ section, amount, rate, tax }], total_before_rebate_new_regime: slab_tax_new_regime + sum(special_rate_tax) }
logic.else: if taxable_income_new_regime is not available: block on R-0015 output.

authority.section: Section 115BAC (New Tax Regime), Finance Act First Schedule Part I
authority.circular: CBDT Circular 04/2023 (employer TDS under new regime)

notes: Unlike the Old Regime, the New Regime has a single slab schedule regardless of taxpayer age. This simplifies computation significantly. However, no deductions are available (except standard deduction already applied in R-0015 and employer NPS in R-0015). The standard deduction of ₹75,000 was added to the New Regime from AY2024-25; this is already subtracted by R-0015 before this rule runs.
